notes: v366 — AUTO-PILOT DEEP AUDIT: 11 bugs fixed + smarter risk maths. Two independent code audits went over every line of the buy pipeline, the fill/sell engines and the report-card statistics. FIXED: (1) the intraday fill engine was reading the wrong data format, so 🎣 dip orders NEVER filled on an intraday dip and 'market' buys filled at the close, not the promised next-day open — this quietly biased all paper results; (2) two background engines could overwrite each other's account saves, able to erase a buy or resurrect a sold position; (3) the trailing stop re-judged already-scanned days against its own later, higher stop — fabricating phantom stop-outs dated in the past; (4) 🔁 repeat picks read the OLDEST trade instead of the newest, so 'pause after a stop-out' never engaged once a cycle had won; (5) ⏱ max-hold stops fired days late at the wrong price; (6) 🎯 picks could write to whichever account you were viewing instead of the bot's; (7) a suspended share's $0 quote could 'fill' an order and mint free shares; (8) 🎣 100% dip setting corrupted the cash balance; (9) undoing a sale leaked the brokerage fee; (10) every pending order showed a false 'balance corrupted' warning of exactly one fee; (11) withdrawing practice cash wrecked the return %. REPORT CARD made honest: outcomes now measured from the next day's close (the price a follower can actually get — the old maths counted the overnight gap and flattered every signal), each flag counts once per 5-day episode instead of five times (no more overconfident SOLID/PROMISING tiers from one event), average volume matches how live flags compute it, one-day split artefacts can't dominate a grade, and a bullish flag that precedes FALLS can no longer display SOLID. Expect tiers to DROP — that's the truth surfacing, not a break. NEW: 🌏 regime gate (only buy while the index ETF closes above its 50-day average — sits out falling markets), 🎲 risk-per-trade sizing (every full stop-out costs the same ~1% of account: volatile shares get smaller parcels automatically), 🧊 5-day cooldown (never re-buys a share it was just stopped out of). 🏆 Best-practice sets the new gates automatically — re-tap it and Save to adopt them. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v366.
